title: Agent git rails
outcome: policies/agent-git.policy.toml declares the three git tiers (allow: status/diff/log/branch --show-current/worktree list; gate: commit/pull/checkout -b; block: push/push --force/reset --hard/clean + delete untracked) plus [remote] writes = elevated. Superset of no-agent-git-push (kept as the publish-specific statement). docs/agent-rails.md gains the allow/gate/block section. Graph derives agent -blocked-by-> policy:agent-git via the existing applies_to=agent derivation.
validation: moon run archon:validate PASS; policy validates against policy.schema.json; graph 27 nodes/23 edges with edge agent -blocked-by-> policy:agent-git present.
decisions: push/reset --hard/clean blocked by default; remote writes require elevated policy + human approval
runtime command interception deferred to Kraken — same boundary as no-agent-git-push and secret CLIs on PATH
token_note: enabling — safety prerequisite for agent git workflows, expressed as one policy + one graph edge
